LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ORZELL LONG'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER OPPOSITION FOR GRANTING DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1008(A). PLAINTIFF FAILS TO HIGHLIGHT ANY NEW FACTS, LAW, OR CIRCUMSTANCES THAT WARRANTS RECONSIDERATION. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE AFFIDAVIT REQUIREMENT OF CCP 1008. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Mtn To Reconsider Oppos For Granting Deft'S Mtn For Summary Judgment/Adjudication
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Orzell Long telephone number 415-305-1390 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Kimberly Bliss of Office of The City Attorney telephone number 415-554-3861 for Defendants.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ORZELL LONG'S Motion To Reconsider Opposition For Granting Defendant's Motion For Summary Judgment is denied. Plaintiff's motion for reconsideration does not comply with CCP 1008(a). Plaintiff fails to highlight any new facts, law, or circumstances that warrants reconsideration. In addition, plaintiff did not comply with the affidavit requirement of CCP 1008. Order and judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

Mtn To Reconsider Oppos For Granting Deft'S Mtn For Summary Judgment/Adjudication

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFF ORZELL LONG'S Motion To Reconsider Opposition For Granting Defendant's Motion For Summary Judgment/Adjudication is continued on the court's own motion to January 7, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 so that it can be heard by Judge Goldsmith.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-06-2015 Set For Case Management Conference On Mar-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Orzell Long, in pro per, Tel. 415.305.1390, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court did not receive notice of contest from plaintiff. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CHIEF OF POLICE GREG SUHR MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication is granted. Defendant has maintained its burden of production and demonstrated that none of plaintiff's claims can be established. In opposition, plaintiff fails to present any competent evidence to create a triable issue of material fact. The court sustains defendant's evidentiary objections. Furthermore, plaintiff failed to provide an opposing separate statement in compliance with CCP 437c(b). The failure to provide that opposing separate statement is grounds alone to grant the motion. See CCP 437c(b)(3). Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302.
